description: Verify target rows display correct data, statuses, and edit buttons
gherkin:
When the user is on the "Partner Delivery" Targets tab
Then each row should display the following columns:
* Target
* Channel
* Partner
* Type
* Status
And the status column should show correct tags based on data:
* Status Value: no_channel  - Blue tag labeled "no_channel"
* Status Value: pending - Blue tag labeled "pending"
* Status Value: bad - Red tag labeled "bad"
And each row should have a clickable "Edit" button
When the user clicks the "Edit" button for any row
Then it should navigate to the Mapping page

steps.action: *When* the user is on the "Partner Delivery" Targets tab
